description:
You are an MLOps engineer who must quickly catalogue the exact size of every artifact produced by a recent experiment run.  
The artifacts are already present inside:

/home/user/experiments/run_03/

Create a CSV summary called

/home/user/experiments/run_03/artifact_report.csv

The CSV must be produced from the shell with a **single command** (one-liner; you may use pipes).  
Format requirements that the automated checker will enforce:

1. The very first row MUST be the header:
   filename,bytes
   (all lowercase, exactly as shown, no leading or trailing spaces).

2. Each subsequent row must contain:
   • the artifact’s base filename (no path),  
   • a comma,  
   • the exact file size in bytes (as an unsigned integer, no extra spaces).

3. Rows must be sorted alphabetically by filename (ascending, case-sensitive).

4. Every line, including the last, must be terminated with a single UNIX newline \n.

Example of the expected layout (values shown here are placeholders—your command must generate the real sizes):

filename,bytes
alpha.txt,12
beta.bin,125

Produce the file in one step and ensure it is saved exactly at the path given above. No additional columns, quotation marks, or blank lines are allowed.
truth:
Initial filesystem state before the task starts:

Directory: /home/user/experiments/run_03/

Files and their exact contents (each ends with a single newline character):

1. /home/user/experiments/run_03/model.pt  
   Content:  
   DUMMY_MODEL_CONTENT\n  
   Byte length: 20

2. /home/user/experiments/run_03/metrics.json  
   Content:  
   {"accuracy": 0.92, "loss": 0.15}\n  
   Byte length: 33

3. /home/user/experiments/run_03/config.yaml  
   Content:  
   batch_size: 32\n  
   learning_rate: 0.001\n  
   Byte length: 36

4. /home/user/experiments/run_03/training.log  
   Content:  
   Epoch,Loss,Accuracy\n  
   1,0.45,0.78\n  
   2,0.32,0.84\n  
   3,0.21,0.88\n  
   Byte length: 56

Desired final artifact that the agent must create:

/home/user/experiments/run_03/artifact_report.csv  
Exact required content (each line terminated by '\n'):

filename,bytes
config.yaml,36
metrics.json,33
model.pt,20
training.log,56

No other files should be created or modified.
name: task_000000_6812317c
